name: Anderson Recreation Center
description: Anderson Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Anderson, SC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Anderson Sports & Ent Center
description: Anderson Sports & Ent Center is a place to play pickleball in Anderson, SC. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Wren Hurricane Park
description: Wren Hurricane Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Piedmont, SC. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
